title: ALWCOMBORDER - Clause b of Section 9.2.2.2.1 is ignored

features.name: always_comb variable driven after use on RHS
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block where a variable assigned on the LHS is also referenced on the RHS before the assignment, triggering ALWCOMBORDER warning

features.name: always_comb with multiple assignment branches referencing driven variable
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block with conditional branches where a variable is assigned in each branch and also used in the condition, with warning suppression expected per SV spec
